tools.Name: MarkItDown
tools.Description: A lightweight Python utility for converting various file types (PDF, Office, Images, Audio, etc.) to Markdown.
tools.Use_Case: Preparing diverse documents for input into LLM and text analysis pipelines while preserving structure.

tools.Name: DeepTutor
tools.Description: An agent-native personalized learning assistant that integrates chat, research, quiz generation, and math visualization.
tools.Use_Case: Providing structured, multi-step learning journeys with persistent memory for educational contexts.

tools.Name: Scrapling
tools.Description: An adaptive Web Scraping framework that features element tracking and automatic anti-bot bypass.
tools.Use_Case: Scaling up data collection from dynamic websites with resilient parsing and concurrent crawl capabilities.
